# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"

---
# Linkerd proxy configuration defaults for the namespace
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-config
  namespace: microservices
data:
  proxy-log-level: "warn"
  proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
  proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
  proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
  proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"

---
# Server definition for the API Gateway service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# Server definition for the User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-server
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# Server definition for the Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-server
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8082
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# Server definition for the Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-server
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8083
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# Server definition for the Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-server
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8084
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# Network Authentication: Only allow meshed (mTLS) clients
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: microservices
      name: api-gateway-sa
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: microservices
      name: user-service-sa
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: microservices
      name: order-service-sa
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: microservices
      name: payment-service-sa
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: microservices
      name: notification-service-sa

---
# Default deny-all authorization policy for the namespace
# This ensures no unmeshed traffic (no mTLS) is allowed
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-unauthenticated
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Default deny policy - blocks all non-mTLS traffic"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: microservices
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-tls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Authorization: API Gateway can talk to User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-user-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-mtls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-mtls-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: microservices
      name: api-gateway-sa

---
# Authorization: API Gateway can talk to Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-mtls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Authorization: Order Service can talk to Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-mtls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: order-service-mtls-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: microservices
      name: order-service-sa

---
# Authorization: Order Service can talk to Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-notification-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: notification-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-mtls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Authorization: Payment Service can talk to Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-payment-to-notification-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: notification-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: payment-service-mtls-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: payment-service-mtls-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: microservices
      name: payment-service-sa

---
# Service Accounts for each microservice
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sa
  namespace: microservices

---
# API Gateway Deployment with Linkerd injection annotations
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-on-inbound-ports: "8080"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "8080"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway-sa
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: api-gateway:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
# User Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: user-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-on-inbound-ports: "8081"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "8081"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: user-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: user-service
          image: user-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
# Order Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-on-inbound-ports: "8082"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "8082"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: order-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
# Payment Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-on-inbound-ports: "8083"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "8083"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: payment-service
          image: payment-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
# Notification Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-on-inbound-ports: "8084"
        config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "8084"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: notification-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: notification-service
          image: notification-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8084
              name: http
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15

---
# Kubernetes Services
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-gateway
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: user-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: order-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: payment-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: notification-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8084
      targetPort: 8084
  type: ClusterIP

---
# HTTPRoute for API Gateway to User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-to-user-service-route
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-server
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/users
      filters: []

---
# HTTPRoute for API Gateway to Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-to-order-service-route
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: order-service-server
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/orders
      filters: []

---
# HTTPRoute for Order Service to Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: order-to-payment-service-route
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: payment-service-server
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/payments
      filters: []

---
# Network Policy to enforce mTLS at the network level as additional defense
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-non-mesh-traffic
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
    # Allow DNS resolution
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
